mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (user_id, product_id, product_type, score, content, images, create_time, order_item_id, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{productType}, #{score}, #{content}, #{images}, #{createTime}, #{orderItemId}, #{status})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE product_type = #{productType} AND product_id = #{productId} AND status = 1
AND score = #{score}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM comments WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
